Iran Krieg Daily bundle

Contents
- scripts/reduce_iran_krieg_points.py
- data/iran_krieg_daily/config.json
- data/iran_krieg_daily/README.md
- data/iran_krieg_daily/ch.srf.iran-krieg.reduce-points.plist
- data/iran_krieg_daily/LAUNCHD_COMMANDS.md
- empty runtime folders: input, output, output/old, logs

Install
1. Unzip this bundle into the target project folder.
2. Run the script from the project root with:
   python3 scripts/reduce_iran_krieg_points.py
3. If you want scheduled runs via launchd, edit
   data/iran_krieg_daily/ch.srf.iran-krieg.reduce-points.plist
   so its absolute paths match the local machine.

Notes
- Python 3 is required.
- The script fetches live data from SRF and Datawrapper.
- The config currently uses https://www.srf.ch/news/iran-krieg as the stable source hub.
